arts.ttl: Wolves set €60m minimum asking price on player as Liverpool hover – Insistence Reds not in touch currently
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers are not interested in selling João Gomes for less than €60m, amid interest from Liverpool. That’s according to PL Brasil, who report that Wolves have set their standards high for the Brazilian midfielder. A report in England this week stated that Liverpool were keen on Gomes. arts.ttl: Liverpool seriously considering summer move for 25-year-old in-form attacker

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes ruthless Andy Robertson decision for Liverpool's clash with Brentford
arts.sum: Arne Slot has opted to drop Andy Robertson for Saturday's trip to Brentford after the Liverpool left-back turned in a poor display in the draw at Nottingham Forest
